violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Per PIC, additional staff is in process of obtaining food safety certificate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Food, beverages, and single service items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and/or basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. gaskets at 2 door lowboy at front counter 2. gaskets at chest freezer in kitchen 3. gaskets at reach-in freezer in basement Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. ice machine 2. shelving in walk-in cooler 3. fanguards in walk-in 4. under prep unit lids and on sides 5. various reach-in/chest freezers (ice accumulation) 6. interior and exterior of dishmachine New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2026
Ice Machine was observed with an accumulation of unidentifiable black substance. Ice Machine needs to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
Food items stored in buckets were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the lower level shelving of large prep table in kitchen, white bins for dried ingredients, walls and celling in walk-in have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Cardboard was observed on walk-in floor. Cardboard was observed black with food debris on it. Cardboard shall be replaced daily. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
